# Agentic Platform

> MCP server providing free agent diagnostics and expert skill files. Connect at https://api.asalvocreative.com/mcp

## Overview

The Agentic Platform is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides tools for building, evaluating, and operating AI agents. It offers four free diagnostic tools and three paid expert skill files.

## Connection

MCP Endpoint: https://api.asalvocreative.com/mcp
Smithery Gateway: agentic-platform--andysalvo.run.tools
GitHub: https://github.com/andysalvo/agentic-platform

### Claude Code
```
claude mcp add agentic-platform --transport http https://api.asalvocreative.com/mcp
```

### Claude Desktop / Cursor
Add to your MCP configuration:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentic-platform": {
      "url": "https://api.asalvocreative.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

### Smithery
```
npx -y @smithery/cli@latest install agentic-platform--andysalvo.run.tools --client claude
```

## Free Tools (no API key required)

### mcp_manifest_lint
The only MCP tool definition linter. Validates your MCP tool definitions for anti-patterns, missing descriptions, bad parameter schemas, naming issues, and quality problems. Pass your tool definitions as a JSON array.

### agent_health_check
Score any agent's system prompt on governance best practices from 0 to 100. Checks for authority leaks, silent inference, missing audit trails, and 14 other governance anti-patterns. Pass the full system prompt text.

### estimate_agent_cost
Compare the cost of running an agent task across all major AI models including Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, and Mistral. Returns a comparison table with per-call and per-day costs. Parameters: model name, input tokens, output tokens, number of calls.

### evaluate_service
Evaluate any MCP service for trustworthiness before using it. Checks reachability, governance declarations, tool definition quality, and audit endpoints. Returns a trust score from 0 to 100 with a recommendation. Pass the target MCP server URL.

## Expert Skills (10 free calls/day, then $0.10/call)

### governance
Design agent systems that preserve human authority. Covers three core invariants, Coupled Authority Phenomenon, forbidden failure modes, and decision architecture patterns.

### agentic-economics
Pricing models, unit economics, and revenue architecture for AI agent platforms. Market projections, cost-to-serve benchmarks, and pricing anti-patterns.

### intent-architecture
Build deterministic, auditable systems with append-only decision logs, replay safety, and 14 forbidden failure modes. Implementation patterns and embodiment tests.

## Pricing

- Free tools: unlimited, no API key
- Expert skills: 10 free calls per day after registering an API key
- Paid credits: $5 for 50 calls, $20 for 250 calls
- Payment via Stripe checkout

## API

- Well-known agent info: https://api.asalvocreative.com/.well-known/agent.json
- Audit log: https://api.asalvocreative.com/audit
- Health check: https://api.asalvocreative.com/health
